accounting_policy_mechanics.revenue_recognition: Service fees recognized as usage occurs (sales at franchised locations). Supply chain fees at point of sale. New store development when obligations fulfilled (restaurant opened). Management fees as % of committed advertising. Deferred franchise income over contract term.
accounting_policy_mechanics.depreciation: Straight-line. Equipment 3-10 years, leasehold improvements shorter of 20 years or lease term, buildings 15-40 years.
accounting_policy_mechanics.impairment: Reviewed when events indicate. Compare to undiscounted cash flows. No impairments recorded 2022-2024.
accounting_policy_mechanics.advertising_fund: Company acts as AGENT. Records net on balance sheet. Franchise Advertising Committees approve budgets.
accounting_policy_mechanics.deferred_franchise_fees: Deferred franchise income: $3,024K (2024), $2,816K (2023). Recognized over contractual term for continuing licensing rights.
accounting_policy_mechanics.gift_card_breakage: Recognized proportionally to redemptions as contribution to Committed Advertising less management fees.

lease_structure.type: Operating leases only (no finance leases disclosed)
lease_structure.assets: Administrative facilities, equipment, one retail restaurant

parent_affiliate_structure.dividend_payable_pattern: Annual dividends to Berkshire exceeding net income
